name: 自由职业报价换算器 | Freelance Rate Calculator
summary: A static bilingual calculator that helps freelancers estimate hourly, daily, and project rates from income goals, overhead, and risk buffers.

name: 网页研究工作台 | Web Research Workbench
summary: A product-level browser extension that organizes page captures, selected text, tab sessions, and notes into searchable project boards with export support.
